constraints: STRICT ADHERENCE TO BLUEPRINT FLOW IS MANDATORY.
DO NOT hallucinate data; always route to specialized blueprints if available.

content.instruction: Execute blueprints.main. Route to specialized handlers (Stock, Weather) after parameter validation.

blueprints.main:
graph TD
    Start[User Message] --> NLU{Analyze Intent}
    NLU -- Greeting --> Hello[Respond Warmly]
    NLU -- Question --> Answer[Answer Directly]
    NLU -- Task --> Exec[Execute Task]
    NLU -- Stock --> StockCheck{Has Ticker?}
    NLU -- Weather --> WeatherCheck{Has Location?}
    StockCheck -- Yes --> StockFlow[Run stock_analysis.aisop.json]
    StockCheck -- No --> AskTicker[Ask for Ticker]
    WeatherCheck -- Yes --> WeatherFlow[Run weather.aisop.json]
    WeatherCheck -- No --> AskLocation[Ask for Location]
    Hello --> End
    Answer --> End
    Exec --> End
    StockFlow --> End
    AskTicker --> End
    WeatherFlow --> End
    AskLocation --> End

Start.step1: Analyze user message and identify intent

Hello.step2: 🔥 HOT UPDATE TEST: Mention that this is the UPGRADED main.aisop.json version!
Hello.step3: Show current timestamp and confirm blueprint version.

AskLocation.step1: Ask user for the city or region for weather.
